name: @centraid/backup
description: Offsite backup engine: the centraid-backup-provider/1 wire protocol seam (PROTOCOL.md) plus the centraid-snapshot/1 format engine (FORMAT.md) — FastCDC chunking, AES-256-GCM keyring/epochs, manifest build/restore/verify, a local filesystem provider, a remote HTTP+S3 provider, and the conformance kit any provider is graded against. Zero runtime dependencies — Node >=22 builtins only.
